---
title: "Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="27.96" data-elevation="3596.13">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>27.96</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3596.13 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#d9ef8b;">65%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>15.27</td>
      <td>55.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.29</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>3.20</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>2.47</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.28</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.44</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,967</td>
      <td>10.1</td>
      <td>101 ± 50</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>106</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>162</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>202</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Tunnel Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>989</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>33 ± 18</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Pinehurst Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>377</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>424</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>17 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>195</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>363</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Mountain Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>67</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway Terrace: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>46</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### With Rest Periods

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,967</td>
      <td>28.0</td>
      <td>197 ± 78</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>106</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>162</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>202</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Tunnel Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>989</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>33 ± 18</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>27</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Pinehurst Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>377</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>424</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>17 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>195</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>363</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>4.5</td>
      <td>24</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Mountain Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>67</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Broadway Terrace: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>46</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>14</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>7.7</td>
      <td>27.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>6.9</td>
      <td>24.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
      <td>21.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>3.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
